top3.sql:
SELECT 
    ROUND(
        (COUNT(CASE WHEN c.isOnlineOnly = 1 THEN 1 END) * 100.0) / COUNT(*), 
        2
    ) AS percentage_online_only
FROM cards c
WHERE 
    c.frameEffects LIKE '%legendary%' 
    AND c.availability LIKE '%online%';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN c.isOnlineOnly = 1 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_online_only
FROM cards c
WHERE 
    c.frameEffects LIKE '%legendary%' 
    AND c.availability LIKE '%online%';

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        (COUNT(CASE WHEN c.isOnlineOnly = 1 THEN 1 END) * 100.0) / COUNT(*), 
        2
    ) AS percentage_online_only
FROM cards c
WHERE 
    c.frameEffects LIKE '%legendary%' 
    AND c.availability LIKE '%online%';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN c.isOnlineOnly = 1 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_online_only
FROM cards c
WHERE 
    c.frameEffects LIKE '%legendary%' 
    AND c.availability LIKE '%online%';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.isOnlineOnly = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_online_only
FROM cards c
WHERE 
    c.frameEffects LIKE '%legendary%' 
    AND c.availability LIKE '%online%';

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        (COUNT(CASE WHEN c.isOnlineOnly = 1 THEN 1 END) * 100.0) / COUNT(*), 
        2
    ) AS percentage_online_only
FROM cards c
WHERE 
    c.frameEffects LIKE '%legendary%' 
    AND c.availability LIKE '%online%';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN c.isOnlineOnly = 1 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_online_only
FROM cards c
WHERE 
    c.frameEffects LIKE '%legendary%' 
    AND c.availability LIKE '%online%';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.isOnlineOnly = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_online_only
FROM cards c
WHERE 
    c.frameEffects LIKE '%legendary%' 
    AND c.availability LIKE '%online%';

final.sql:
SELECT 
    ROUND(
        (COUNT(CASE WHEN c.isOnlineOnly = 1 THEN 1 END) * 100.0) / COUNT(*), 
        2
    ) AS percentage_online_only
FROM cards c
WHERE 
    c.frameEffects LIKE '%legendary%' 
    AND c.availability LIKE '%online%';
